title: medecoole's cooler tools
description: Get more (and cooler) tools with renamed items!
body:
This is medecoole's cooler tools!

Here are the renamable tools and names for them:

- netherite sword: "Ender sword"
- netherite axe: "Chorus axe"
- netherite pickaxe: "Ruby pickaxe", "Ruby drill"
- netherite shovel: "Sapphire shovel"
- netherite hoe: "Emerald hoe"

**and for all netherite armor pieces rename them to: "Emerald (INSERT ARMOR TYPE HERE)"**
